lines: the dragon hides in the cave and waits
the goblin drops his sword and runs
a brave knight rides across the bridge
the wizard mutters a strange old spell
three slimes bounce across the muddy road
the old chest creaks open all by itself
a hungry ogre stomps through the swamp
the torch flickers but never goes out
your shield cracks but somehow holds
the map shows a path nobody has walked
the archer counts her arrows twice
a cold wind blows through the ruined tower
the potion bubbles and smells like berries
two guards argue outside the locked gate
the dungeon floor is slick with old moss
a raven watches you from the broken window
the bard plays a song nobody asked for
your boots squelch in the swampy mud
